overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a hooded character walking through a dense, atmospheric forest at night. The scene features cinematic blue-green moonlight filtering through tall pines, with the character navigating a winding dirt path that eventually leads alongside a stream or pond.

segments.scene_description: The hooded character walks along a narrow dirt path through a dense pine forest at night. A lit wooden lantern appears on the left around 6 seconds, casting warm orange light against the cool blue moonlight, before the character passes it by.

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the forest, the path winds between tall trees and moss-covered rocks. The lighting remains dim and atmospheric with blue-green tones, and the character navigates the uneven terrain as the lantern disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path alongside a stream with reeds and mossy banks

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly to reveal a stream or small pond on the right side of the path. The character walks alongside the water, with reeds and mossy boulders visible at the water's edge while tall trees continue to line the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, moonlit pine forest that gradually opens up to reveal a serene waterfront. It begins with a hooded character navigating a narrow dirt path under cool blue-green moonlight, passing a lit wooden lantern that casts a brief, warm orange glow against the dark woods. As the character moves further into the forest, the path winds between towering trees and moss-covered rocks while the lantern's light fades into the atmospheric dimness. The scene then expands as the dense foliage thins, revealing a stream or small pond on the right side of the route. Finally, the camera follows the character alongside the water's edge, passing reeds and mossy boulders as the tall pines continue to line the path.
